title: Soulbound
description: An enchantment that retains items upon death
body:
Soulbound adds a single enchantment. When applied to an item, it will be retained upon death.

---

### Mod Support
There is direct support for:
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets "Trinkets on Modrinth")
- [Universal Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/universal-graves "Universal Graves on Modrinth")
